arts.ttl: 'I feel like' - Jordan Henderson sends blunt Virgil van Dijk contract message to Liverpool hierarchy
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk can speak to clubs outside of England from January 1 as his Liverpool contract is set to expire next summer

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shares Ruud van Nistelrooy revenge mission as he backs struggling Leicester boss
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool host Ruud van Nistelrooy's struggling Leicester on Boxing Day, with the Reds boss having never achieved a win over his Dutch compatriot as a manager

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold tells Mo Salah what he must 'never' release to Liverpool fans
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been a key figure for Liverpool alongside Mohamed Salah in recent years and the right-back has now opened up about his off-pitch relationship with the Egyptian

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Leicester City's Ruud van Nistelrooy advantage ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: As manager of Feyenoord, Slot drew and lost to the former Manchester United striker, who was boss of PSV Eindhoven for just over a year, but had the last laugh as his team finished seven points clear in winning the Eredivisie title. Liverpool head coach Arne Slot is looking forward to a reunion with compatriot Ruud van Nistelrooy even if his memories of their tussles in the Netherlands are not particularly happy.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Leicester Prediction: Trent Alexander-Arnold to justify big money demands at Foxes expense
arts.sum: During Liverpool’s title winning campaign in 2019/20, the Reds had what was supposed to be a difficult game against Leicester City on Boxing Day. Jurgen Klopp’s side put in a statement p...

arts.ttl: 'If I were advising them' - Manchester United legend sends 'simple' contract message to Liverpool trio
arts.sum: Dwight Yorke has been talking the futures of Liverpool's Virgil van Dijk, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Mohamed Salah

arts.ttl: Liverpool dealt Boxing Day blow for Leicester City as Arne Slot issues Federico Chiesa update
arts.sum: Liverpool will again be without Ibrahima Konate and Conor Bradley when they host Leicester City on Boxing Day. The defensive pair have missed the Reds' last six matches after suffering injuries against Real Madrid last month. But ahead of the Reds' clash with Leicester City, Slot confirmed that the forward had been suffering with illness, as he also ruled both Konate and Bradley out of the clash with the Foxes.

arts.ttl: “In my opinion…” – Liverpool star sends clear message to Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Virgil van Dijk has sent a clear message to Arne Slot about how much he can continue to offer the team for the next few years. The experienced Netherlands international is not getting any younger, but he remains a player at the top of his game, and it’s surely an important priority to […] The post “In my opinion…” – Liverpool star sends clear message to Arne Slot appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: How Alphonso Davies really feels about PL transfer as Liverpool and Arsenal show interest
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies is available on a free transfer in the summer 👀🚨

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains Federico Chiesa's latest Liverpool absence as Italian's woe continues
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has revealed the reason why Federico Chiesa did not feature in last weekend's thumping 6-3 win away at Tottenham despite playing just days earlier
